$description: Semantic (role) tokens — the cross-system contract every visual system and component speaks. Values here are the DEFAULT (neutral editorial) theme; each themes/*.theme.json (Phase 3) overrides this same key set with its system's palette + signature ease. Examples and the component library reference ONLY these role tokens (never core primitives directly), so a system swap is one theme file. References use DTCG alias syntax: "{group.path.token}".

color.$description: REQUIRED role keys — every theme MUST define all of these (enforced by tools/check-tokens.mjs and the theme-contract in Phase 3).

fg.$description: Primary text — must clear WCAG AA on bg.

accent.$description: The single restrained accent — interactive + narrative punctuation.

ease.$description: Role-keyed easing. Components reference these, not raw curves, so a theme can re-voice its motion (e.g. a 'playful' system swaps reveal for an overshoot) without touching component code.

space.$description: Layout rhythm roles mapped to the core 8px scale.
